title: Task outcome: 사용자가 제공한 공용 OS RAG 학습 자료(URL 앵커, 구성요소별 자료, 내부 근거자료)를 DinoBrain OS에 공개-safe한 durable knowledge/pr
summary: Registered the user-provided public OS RAG learning packet as DinoBrain durable knowledge. The representative URL anchors remain anchor-only/unverified source candidates, while a new accepted memory records how future sessions should use them for LLM Wiki source/chunk/claim lineage, contextual retrieval, hybrid retrieval, reranking, canaries, and behavior evaluation.
claim: Task outcome for DinoBrain: Registered the user-provided public OS RAG learning packet as DinoBrain durable knowledge. The representative URL anchors remain anchor-only/unverified source candidates, while a new accepted memory records how future sessions should use them for LLM Wiki source/chunk/claim lineage, contextual retrieval, hybrid retrieval, reranking, canaries, and behavior evaluation.
request: 사용자가 제공한 공용 OS RAG 학습 자료(URL 앵커, 구성요소별 자료, 내부 근거자료)를 DinoBrain OS에 공개-safe한 durable knowledge/provenance anchor로 등록하고, 나중 검색/검증/구현 로드맵에서 활용 가능하게 분류한다.
decisions: Treat the public OS RAG material as a source-anchor and implementation backlog, not as verified source truth.
Do not invent the missing upstream 55-anchor list; only exact local URLs are registered.
Promote the durable lesson into accepted memory so future sessions know to use source/chunk/claim lineage plus retrieval canaries and behavior evaluation.
next_steps: Import the exact remaining upstream RAG URL list if available.
Fetch and chunk high-priority sources one at a time, then review concrete claims before using them as factual support.
Improve ranking so accepted knowledge and source catalogs outrank broad operational behavior rules for retrieval-intent queries.

evidence.snippet: Registered the user-provided public OS RAG learning packet as DinoBrain durable knowledge. The representative URL anchors remain anchor-only/unverified source candidates, while a new accepted memory records how future sessions should use them for LLM Wiki source/chunk/claim lineage, contextual retrieval, hybrid retrieval, reranking, canaries, and behavior evaluation.

review_notes: Auto-held legacy unreviewed generated memory so it stays out of hot retrieval until lineage is manually confirmed.
